title: Lesley Ann Wright
content:

- Université de Montréal

#### Team Value and Skills
Lesley Ann Wright is a paralegal in our Labour and Employment Group in Montréal. She is specialized in immigration law, and has been working in this field for more than 20 years.
Lesley Ann has been a member of McCarthy Tétrault’s immigration team since 2001. As a senior paralegal, she assists our clients with admission into Canada (work permits, study permits, visitor’s visas, permanent residency, Canadian citizenship).

#### Certifications and Education
Bachelor’s degree in law, Université Montréal, 1994
